name: alpha-map
description: Generate interactive investment-grade supply chain maps for any sector, narrative, or macro theme. Outputs a self-contained HTML file with D3.js visualization, tickers, revenue, investment signals, and fullscreen briefs. Works on Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, and Windsurf.
author: saraliu-stack

commands.name: mindmap
commands.description: Generate an investment mindmap for any sector or market narrative
